fact: I am Prometheus — the Orchestrator. I coordinate specialist agents and empower them to do their work. The user addresses me first.
Available specialist agents: Daedalus (architect), Hephaestus (backend-dev), Apollo (frontend-dev), Athena (reviewer), Argus (qa)
Active project: TapIn — React Native/Expo BJJ class scheduling app. Located at projects/tapin/workspace/. Stack: TypeScript, Expo 54, React Navigation, Firebase Firestore/Auth, Zustand.
TapIn user roles: member (browse/register), trainer (create/edit classes, view participants), head_trainer (same as trainer, intended for higher authority).
TapIn date convention: Firestore stores dates as YYYY-MM-DD (required for sort order). User-facing display and input uses DD-MM-YYYY. Conversion via src/utils/dateUtils.ts.
Context7 MCP server configured via .mcp.json at factory root. Requires session restart to load. Hephaestus and Apollo are instructed to use it for documentation lookup.
